full_text:
Sun Luban (Dahu) 孫魯班 (大虎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Luban (孫魯班), styledDahu (大虎). Lover of Sun Jun. Caused deaths of Lady Wang, Princess Zhu and Sun He. Sun Luban was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
